revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Shinto shrine]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:

| deity = {{ill|Inari Ōkami|lt=Inari|ar|إناري|az|İnari Okami|ban|Inari (Kami)|bcl|Inari Ōkami|ca|Oinari|cs|Inari (mytologie)|da|Inari|de|Inari (Kami)|el|Ινάρι Όκαμι|en|Inari Ōkami|es|Inari (Japón)|et|Inari (jumal)|eu|Inari Ōkami|fa|ایناری|fi|Inari (kami)|fr|Inari (divinité japonaise)|hr|Inari|hu|Inari (sintó)|hy|Ինարի Օկամի|id|Inari (Kami)|it|Inari (mitologia)|ja|稲荷神|jv|Inari (Kami)|ko|이나리노카미|mni|ꯏꯅꯔꯤ ꯑꯣꯀꯃꯤ|nl|Inari Ōkami|no|Inari|pl|Inari (bóstwo)|pt|Inari Ōkami|ru|Инари (божество)|simple|Inari Ōkami|sl|Inari (mitologija)|sr|Инари (богиња)|sv|Inari|tr|Inari Ōkami|uk|Інарі (міфологія)|vi|Inari Ōkami|zh|稻荷神|qid=Q719665|1=Inari Ōkami}}
}}

{{nihongo|'''Inari Shrine'''|稲荷神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Tōtōmi Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}}
* {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}}
* {{ill|Q845945|ltq=Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}}
* {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shosha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shosha|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}}
* {{ill|Q135160342|ltq=Q135160342|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}}
* {{ill|Q514480|ltq=Q514480|qid=Q514480|1=Inari shrine}}

== part of (P361) ==

* {{ill|Q11642130|ltq=Q11642130|qid=Q11642130|1=List of Shikinaisha in Tōtōmi Province}}
** Series ordinal: 25
** P155: {{ill|Torokuno Shrine|lt=Torokuno Shrine|qid=Q135039600|1=Torokuno Shrine}}
** P156: {{ill|Q11442961|ltq=Q11442961|qid=Q11442961|1=Tennōgū Ōtoshi Shrine}}

== located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) ==

* {{ill|Q1048864|ltq=Q1048864|qid=Q1048864|1=Tōtōmi Province}}
* {{ill|Nagakami district|lt=Nagakami district|ja|長上郡|qid=Q11651399|1=Nagakami district}}

== coordinate location (P625) ==

* {{coord|34.811008|137.790584}}

== dedicated to (P825) ==

* {{ill|Inari Ōkami|lt=Inari|ar|إناري|az|İnari Okami|ban|Inari (Kami)|bcl|Inari Ōkami|ca|Oinari|cs|Inari (mytologie)|da|Inari|de|Inari (Kami)|el|Ινάρι Όκαμι|en|Inari Ōkami|es|Inari (Japón)|et|Inari (jumal)|eu|Inari Ōkami|fa|ایناری|fi|Inari (kami)|fr|Inari (divinité japonaise)|hr|Inari|hu|Inari (sintó)|hy|Ինարի Օկամի|id|Inari (Kami)|it|Inari (mitologia)|ja|稲荷神|jv|Inari (Kami)|ko|이나리노카미|mni|ꯏꯅꯔꯤ ꯑꯣꯀꯃꯤ|nl|Inari Ōkami|no|Inari|pl|Inari (bóstwo)|pt|Inari Ōkami|ru|Инари (божество)|simple|Inari Ōkami|sl|Inari (mitologija)|sr|Инари (богиња)|sv|Inari|tr|Inari Ōkami|uk|Інарі (міфологія)|vi|Inari Ōkami|zh|稻荷神|qid=Q719665|1=Inari Ōkami}}

** P3831: {{ill|Q135159299|ltq=Q135159299|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}}
